recommendations.title: World Record
recommendations.overview: A record-breaking competitive runner begins to stretch the limits of the Matrix. Part of the Animatrix collection of animated shorts set in the Matrix universe.

recommendations.title: Lupin the IIIrd: Fujiko's Lie
recommendations.overview: Fujiko Mine, the devastating femme fatale whose only loyalty is to her desire, befriends a young boy whose late father hid away a fortune.  A killer is on the boy's trail and it's up to Fujiko to stop him: but where do her interests really lie?

recommendations.title: Lupin the Third: Jigen's Gravestone
recommendations.overview: Lupin & Jigen have their sights set on a treasure called the Little Comet, which is located in the heavily fortified country of East Doroa. During the heist, Jigen is almost killed by a sniper named Yael Okuzaki. His specialty is preparing tombstones

recommendations.title: Lupin the 3rd: Goemon's Blood Spray
recommendations.overview: A yakuza boss hires Goemon Ishikawa, a modern day samurai, to protect him aboard his cruise ship casino. Everything goes sideways when the famous thief, Lupin the Third, tries to rob the vessel. Lupin's being hunted by a powerful and mysterious man:

recommendations.title: The Animatrix
recommendations.overview: Straight from the creators of the groundbreaking Matrix trilogy, this collection of short animated films from the world's leading anime directors fuses computer graphics and Japanese anime to provide the background of the Matrix universe and the conf
recommendations.director: Koji Morimoto, Takeshi Koike, Shinichiro Watanabe, Andrew R. Jones, Yoshiaki Kawajiri, Mahiro Maeda, Peter Chung

recommendations.title: Ready Player One
recommendations.overview: When the creator of a popular video game system dies, a virtual contest is created to compete for his fortune.

recommendations.title: Death Race 2050
recommendations.overview: The year 2050 the planet has become overpopulated, to help control population the government develops a race. The Death Race. Annually competitors race across the country scoring points for killing people with their vehicles.

recommendations.title: Piper
recommendations.overview: A mother bird tries to teach her little one how to find food by herself. In the process, she encounters a traumatic experience that she must overcome in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Hot Wheels AcceleRacers: Ignition
recommendations.overview: Two rival race teams, the Teku and the Metal Maniacs, are recruited by Dr. Peter Tezla to race in the fantastic Racing Realms and retrieve the all-powerful AcceleChargers before they fall into the hands of the deadly Racing Drones. Our drivers race t

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb: Star Wars
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction, Adventure, TV Movie, Action
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb become the galaxy's unlikeliest last hope when they must return the Death Star plans to the Rebel Alliance.
